info.title: Count Aggregator Public API
info.description: Public read-only endpoints for station metadata and aggregated count data. Interactive documentation is available at `/msp/public/count-aggregator/docs`. OpenAPI JSON is available at `/msp/public/count-aggregator/openapi.json`. Monorepo client contract excludes legacy /wheel-counter/* alias routes.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

parameters.name: includeEmpty
parameters.description: Include stations without time series data.

parameters.name: flat
parameters.description: When true, include every metric as its own GeoJSON feature identified by its platform station id. When false (default), grouped container stations are used instead of their metric children.

parameters.name: includeStats
parameters.description: Include precomputed counter stats (total and lastDays) from cache. Stats are refreshed in the background after imports.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

parameters.name: includeEmpty
parameters.description: Include stations without time series data.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Time bucket used to aggregate count values. Allowed values: `5min`, `15min`, `hourly`, `daily`, `weekly`, `monthly`, `yearly`.

parameters.name: stationIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated MSP station IDs.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of resolution buckets to return.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start of the sliding window as a local calendar date in `Y-m-d` format (station timezone, no offset). When set, returns `limit` resolution buckets beginning at this date.

parameters.name: anchor
parameters.description: Anchor for the sliding window end. Omit to end the window at the current time. Use `lastDataAt` to return the last `limit` resolution buckets ending at each station's `last_data_at` instead of now.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response serialization format. Omit this parameter or use `json` for JSON (default). Use `csv` to download multi-station time series as semicolon-separated CSV. CSV is only supported on multi-station `/last-values/{resolution}` and `/values/{from}/{to}/{resolution}` endpoints that require `stationIds`.

parameters.name: metrics
parameters.description: Comma-separated bucket statistics to return per timestamp. Allowed values: `sum`, `mean`, `min`, `max`, `last`. When omitted, returns the station type default metric only.

schema.description: Comma-separated bucket statistics to return per timestamp. Allowed values: sum, mean, min, max, last.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

parameters.name: stationIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated MSP station IDs.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of the query window in local time (`Y-m-d` or `Y-m-d H:i:s`, `T` separator accepted). All datetimes use local station time in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of the query window in local time (`Y-m-d` or `Y-m-d H:i:s`, `T` separator accepted). All datetimes use local station time in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Aggregation resolution.

CSV is only supported on multi-station `/last-values/{resolution}` and `/values/{from}/{to}/{resolution}` endpoints that require `stationIds`.

200.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection of park-and-ride sites with occupancy summary.
Map of station ID to current occupancy data and hourly averages.

datetime.description: Local station datetime in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

value.description: Backward-compatible alias for the station type default metric when present in the bucket.

originId.description: External origin id from the upstream data source.

type.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

typeLabel.description: German human-readable type label. For grouped container stations: `Main Type: Sub Type, Sub Type 2`.

tags.description: Station tags assigned in the platform (e.g. parking area tags).

hasData.description: Whether the station has imported time series data.

countAggregatorType.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

countAggregatorStationId.description: Stable numeric count aggregator station id for linking to the time-series/data view. Present when this feature represents one data station.

countAggregatorLinks.description: Structured data-view links for grouped multi-metric features. Present when a map feature represents multiple metric/time-series stations.

type.description: Stable count aggregator metric type identifier.

stationId.description: Stable numeric count aggregator station id for this metric.

tagGroups.description: Grouped filter tags for the frontend, keyed by user-facing group name (e.g. `Wetter`, `Mobilität`, `Gewässer`, `Luftqualität`, `Sonstige`).

andJunction.description: When false, any listed tag matches (OR). When true, all listed tags must match (AND).
When false, any listed tag matches (OR). When true, all listed tags must match (AND).
When false, any listed tag matches (OR). When true, all listed tags must match (AND).
When false, any listed tag matches (OR). When true, all listed tags must match (AND).
When false, any listed tag matches (OR). When true, all listed tags must match (AND).

lastDataAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent data point (ISO 8601). Omitted when no data exists.

mapsightIconId.description: Font Awesome icon identifier from the upstream data source (e.g. fa-water). Omitted when no icon is configured.

description.description: Station description from the upstream data source. Omitted when not configured.

unit.description: Physical unit of the metric values as reported by the data source (e.g. `°C`, `µg/m³`). Omitted for dimensionless counters and container stations.

childStations.description: Metric child stations grouped under this container (grouped mode only).

originId.description: External origin id from the data source.

countAggregatorType.description: Stable child metric type identifier for linking to data views.

countAggregatorStationId.description: Stable numeric child station id for linking to the time-series/data view.

unit.description: Physical unit of the metric values as reported by the data source (e.g. `°C`, `µg/m³`). Omitted for dimensionless counters and container stations.

mapsightIconId.description: Font Awesome icon identifier from the upstream data source (e.g. fa-water). Omitted when no icon is configured.

stats.description: Precomputed counter stats for this metric child. Only present when `includeStats=true`.

total.description: Lifetime sum of all counter values (same as `/sums` total).

lastDays.description: Daily totals for the last three days (same as `/sums` lastDays).

datetime.description: Local station datetime in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

parentId.description: Platform station id of the container station (flat mode only).

parentType.description: Type of the container station (flat mode only).

parentTypeLabel.description: German human-readable label of the container station (flat mode only).

stats.description: Precomputed counter stats. Only present when `includeStats=true`. Omitted when not yet cached.

total.description: Lifetime sum of all counter values (same as `/sums` total).

lastDays.description: Daily totals for the last three days (same as `/sums` lastDays).

datetime.description: Local station datetime in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

coordinates.description: Longitude and latitude as `[lon, lat]` in WGS84 (EPSG:4326).

type.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

status.description: Most recent operational status reported for the station, or `null` when unavailable.

defaultMetric.description: Optional per-station override of the type default metric.

supportedResolutions.description: Optional per-station override when available resolutions differ within a type.

type.description: Station type identifier. See `GET /station-types` for currently available types.

defaultMetric.description: Default bucket statistic returned when the `metrics` query parameter is omitted.

supportedResolutions.description: Resolutions available for this station type. Drives wizard and comparison resolution pickers.

fromDateTime.description: Local station datetime in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

toDateTime.description: Local station datetime in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

lastDateTime.description: Local station datetime in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format (no timezone offset).

resolution.description: Time bucket used to aggregate count values. Allowed values: `5min`, `15min`, `hourly`, `daily`, `weekly`, `monthly`, `yearly`.
